installer.wslAdminPrompt: An administrator window will open. Please wait until the installation is complete.
installer.adminRequired: Administrator privileges are required. Please select "Yes" in the UAC prompt.
installer.windowsVersionError: Your Windows version does not support WSL. Windows 10 version 2004 or later is required.
installer.biosVirtualization: Virtualization must be enabled in BIOS. Restart your PC and enable VT-x/AMD-V in the BIOS settings.
installer.wslInstallFailed: WSL installation failed. Please try running 'wsl --install' manually in PowerShell (Run as Administrator).
installer.wslDone: WSL installation complete! A reboot is required.
installer.aptFailed: apt-get failed -- required packages may already be installed
installer.pythonWslInstalling: Installing Python 3 inside WSL (for bundled skills)...
installer.pythonNativeManual: Install Python 3.10+ from python.org or your package manager, then run the environment check again.
installer.xcodeOpening: Opening the Xcode Command Line Tools installer...
installer.xcodePrompt: Click "Install" on the popup. Waiting for completion...
installer.xcodeDone: Xcode Command Line Tools installation complete!
installer.xcodeTimeout: Xcode Command Line Tools installation timed out. Please run xcode-select --install in the terminal.
installer.ollamaInstalling: Installing Ollama (this may take several minutes)...
installer.ollamaWslZstdPrep: Preparing WSL: installing zstd (required by the Ollama installer)...
installer.ollamaVerifyingApi: Checking that Ollama is listening on port 11434 inside WSL (starting service if needed)...
installer.ollamaApiStillDown: Ollama is installed in WSL but port 11434 did not respond in time. In Ubuntu run: ollama serve — or open /tmp/ollama-enchante.log — then use “Check Ollama API” on the Model step.
installer.ollamaApiEnsureError: Could not verify Ollama API in WSL: {{error}}
installer.ollamaDoneReady: Ollama is installed and the API is reachable — you can continue.
installer.ollamaDoneButNoApi: Ollama files are installed, but the API is not up yet — fix with ollama serve in Ubuntu, then Check Ollama API before Next.
installer.ollamaMacManual: Could not install Ollama via Homebrew. Install from https://ollama.com/download or run: brew install ollama
installer.ollamaManualOnlyWindows: This app does not install Ollama inside Windows/WSL anymore. Use the in-app guide: download Ollama for Windows, set OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434, restart Ollama, then tap Check again in the wizard.

onboarder.ollamaUsingUrl: Ollama reachable from WSL at {{url}} — using for onboard.
onboarder.ollamaUsingWindowsHostGuess: Ollama not on WSL localhost; using Windows host {{url}} for onboard (ensure the Ollama Windows app is running).
onboarder.ollamaUnreachableWsl: Could not verify Ollama from WSL. Using {{url}} — start Ollama (Windows app or Ubuntu) and ensure port 11434 answers from WSL.
onboarder.ollamaWindowsBindLocalhostHint: Likely fix: Ollama on Windows is only listening on 127.0.0.1, so WSL cannot reach {{url}}. Set environment variable OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434 (User or System), fully quit Ollama from the system tray and start it again, then retry. Allow port 11434 in Windows Firewall if prompted. See https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/faq.mdx
onboarder.ollamaNothingListening11434: Nothing responded on port 11434 after auto-start attempts (Windows Ollama.exe + WSL `ollama serve` if installed). Install from https://ollama.com/download, or in WSL run `ollama serve` manually and check `/tmp/ollama-enchante.log`. If Ollama uses a custom bind, set Windows user environment variable OLLAMA_HOST (e.g. host:port) and restart the app. Then save configuration again.

gateway.notInstalledRetry: [gateway] Service not installed detected, retrying after install
gateway.zaloPatchApplied: [gateway] Applied Enchante fix for Zalo import (OpenClaw package used a dev path for resolveClientIp).
gateway.zaloPatchFailed: [gateway] Could not apply Zalo import patch via WSL (see docs/CHANNELS-ZALO-UPSTREAM.md for manual fix).
gateway.stopSupervisedBeforeRun: [gateway] Stopping supervised gateway (if any) so foreground gateway run can bind port 18789.
gateway.startTimeout: [gateway] Timed out waiting for gateway to listen on port 18789.
gateway.usingExistingListener: [gateway] Gateway already listening (supervised or other instance). Using it — no second process needed.
gateway.adoptAfterExit: [gateway] Foreground process exited but port is still open — treating gateway as running.
gateway.ensureRetry: [gateway] First start did not succeed; stopping and retrying once…

backup.noConfig: No OpenClaw configuration to back up.
